0.name: 4284 NTS Phox2b Glut_7
0.rationale: Top DB score (2) but anatomically incompatible — Nucleus tractus solitarii (NTS) is a distant hindbrain region with no relationship to MBA:464 (MPN/MPOA). Phox2b is a hindbrain/autonomic TF absent from MPOA. Glutamatergic identity. The score-2 likely reflects Esr1 and one other marker hitting in brainstem populations where estrogen receptor is expressed (relevant to autonomic function). male_female_ratio 1.86 — moderately male-biased but irrelevant given wrong anatomy. EXCLUDE.

1.name: 0486 PVpo-VMPO-MPN Hmx2 Gaba_5
1.rationale: Only rank-1 candidate with MPN (medial preoptic nucleus) directly in the label alongside VMPO (ventromedial preoptic area) and PVpo (preoptic periventricular area). This is the correct anatomical lineage for MPOA Esr1 neurons (MBA:464). GABAergic identity is consistent with the heterogeneous MPOA population (notes indicate both GABAergic and glutamatergic neurons, but GABAergic is the dominant MPOA NT type). Hmx2 is a homeodomain TF expressed in preoptic hypothalamic neurons. The Esr1, Ar, Pgr marker set is highly expressed in preoptic GABAergic neurons in WMBv1 data. No sex ratio at supertype level but MPOA sex bias is complex (male > female in neuron number). No negative markers to evaluate (mpoa_esr1_neuron has none). KEY CAVEAT: This supertype is heterogeneous and encompasses the full preoptic GABAergic lineage — individual Esr1-high clusters within this supertype would be the specific mapping targets. The classical node itself is acknowledged as heterogeneous (notes: 'may be better represented as multiple terms'). Best available candidate. Parent: CS20230722_SUBC_106.

1.name: 0449 AHN-SBPV-PVHd Pdrm12 Gaba_4
1.rationale: Anterior hypothalamic nucleus (AHN) / subparaventricular zone (SBPV) / dorsal parvicellular PVH — hypothalamic regions adjacent to MPOA but not MPN proper. GABAergic. Pdrm12 is expressed in hypothalamic GABAergic populations. Esr1 is expressed in AHN, making a marker hit plausible. AHN is anatomically adjacent to MPOA and shares steroid receptor expression patterns. ADJACENT caveat applies: AHN and PVHd are near but distinct from MBA:464 (MPN). Weaker candidate than SUPT_0486 on location grounds. Parent: CS20230722_SUBC_098.

1.name: 0374 CEA-AAA-BST Six3 Sp9 Gaba_2
1.rationale: Central amygdala (CEA) / anterior amygdaloid area (AAA) / bed nucleus of stria terminalis (BST) GABAergic supertype. BST is adjacent to MPOA but CEA is more distant. Six3 Sp9 are shared TFs with preoptic GABAergic lineages, consistent with extended amygdala / preoptic continuum. However, the primary labels are CEA/AAA rather than MPN/MPOA. The classical node is specifically MPOA-located. ADJACENT/DISTANT flag: CEA is genuinely counter-evidence, BST is weakly adjacent. Treat as WEAK. Parent: CS20230722_SUBC_080.

1.name: 0348 MEA-BST Lhx6 Sp9 Gaba_2
1.rationale: Medial amygdala (MEA) / BST GABAergic supertype. MEA and MPOA share Lhx6+ GABAergic lineage and steroid receptor expression; Esr1/Ar/Pgr are prominent in MEA. However, MEA is anatomically distinct from MBA:464 (MPN). The marker hit is biologically meaningful but the location is a significant caveat. Treat as WEAK — could be a parallel population in the telencephalic-hypothalamic continuum rather than a direct match. Parent: CS20230722_SUBC_074.

1.name: 0304 LSX Otx2 Gaba_4
1.rationale: Lateral septum (LSX) GABAergic supertype. Lateral septum is adjacent to preoptic area and shares some Esr1/steroid receptor expression but is anatomically distinct from MBA:464 (MPN). Weakly adjacent. Parent: CS20230722_SUBC_068.

1.name: 0055 MEA Slc17a7 Glut_1
1.rationale: Medial amygdala glutamatergic supertype (Slc17a7 = Vglut1). MEA Esr1 neurons exist but: (1) glutamatergic identity is noted as a less dominant NT type in MPOA; (2) MEA is anatomically distinct from MBA:464. Weaker than MEA-BST GABAergic candidates. Parent: CS20230722_SUBC_012.

1.name: 0585 PVH-SO-PVa Otp Glut_1
1.rationale: Paraventricular hypothalamus (PVH) / supraoptic nucleus (SO) / preoptic periventricular area glutamatergic supertype. Esr1 is expressed in PVH but PVH is a distinct nucleus from MPN/MPOA. PVa (preoptic periventricular area) is adjacent to MPN, providing a minor anatomical connection. Glutamatergic identity is consistent with a subset of MPOA neurons but Otp is more characteristic of PVH/SON than MPOA. Treat as WEAK. Parent: CS20230722_SUBC_133.

1.name: 0276 STR D2 Gaba_3
1.rationale: Striatum D2 GABAergic (medium spiny neuron) supertype. Esr1 and Ar are expressed in striatum but this is anatomically distant from MPOA and the D2 MSN identity is incompatible with hypothalamic neuron biology. EXCLUDE.

1.name: 0182 Vip Gaba_10
1.rationale: VIP-expressing cortical GABAergic interneuron supertype. VIP interneurons express Esr1 but this is a cortical interneuron type with no preoptic provenance. EXCLUDE.

1.name: 0730 PAG-SC Pou4f1 Zic1 Glut_1
1.rationale: Periaqueductal gray / superior colliculus — distant mesencephalon. Glutamatergic. Not a viable candidate.

non_candidates_summary: All 30 rank-0 candidates are anatomically incompatible with MBA:464 (MPN/MPOA). The highest DB scores (2) reflect Esr1 and one of Ar/Pgr hitting in hindbrain and subpallial populations where steroid receptors are broadly expressed — the anatomical constraint was not sufficient to filter these out at query time. No rank-0 candidate carries MPN, POA, VMPO, or preoptic labels. At rank-1, CS20230722_SUPT_0486 (PVpo-VMPO-MPN Hmx2 Gaba_5) is the clear top candidate with direct MPN/VMPO/PVpo anatomical label and GABAergic identity. The mpoa_esr1_neuron classical node is acknowledged as heterogeneous, so the mapping will likely resolve to a subset of clusters within SUPT_0486. Steroid-receptor-expressing adjacent populations in MEA-BST and AHN lineages are biologically plausible but anatomically distinct. The classical node notes that Nts (neurotensin)-positive MPOA Esr1 neurons govern female socio-sexual behaviors — checking for Nts co-expression in SUPT_0486 clusters would help refine the mapping further.
